[Rerun Pick-Up Recruitment Preview]

A Rerun Pick-Up Recruitment will begin on 5/30 (Tue)!
Pick-Up Student: 3★ Chinatsu (Hot Spring)

Pick-Up Recruitment Schedule: 5/30 (Tue) After Maintenance – 6/6 (Tue) 1:59 AM (UTC)
